name: X-Golf
address: 1 Towne Centre Blvd STE 4500, Fredericksburg, VA 22407
about: X-Golf Fredericksburg is a modern indoor golf facility featuring state-of-the-art simulators designed for year-round play, training, and entertainment. The venue offers a range of services including league play, personalized instruction using simulator analytics, and professional PXG club fittings. With a focus on convenience and technology, the space provides a relaxed atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels to enjoy the game in a climate-controlled environment. Membership plans are available for frequent players, offering monthly simulator hours and discounts on additional bay time and league fees.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with advanced tracking technology
Year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Professional instruction with instant swing data and video analysis
Flexible space designed for both casual play and serious practice
A variety of membership options for frequent players

food_and_drink.notes: Full lineup of delicious food available with a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere
Refreshing drinks available to elevate the experience

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators mentioned throughout the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but the facility provides all necessary equipment for use with their simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: X-Golf Fredericksburg offers a full menu of food and drinks available for purchase. The venue also features a kitchen and bar service for guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play, with the exact time depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Fredericksburg kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels and ages, making it suitable for families and children. They also offer birthday party packages and events.
